name: loop-engineering
description: Product OS and GitHub Issue based full-loop engineering workflows for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Run Product OS and GitHub Issue engineering loops
interface.longDescription: Use Loop Engineering to initialize Product OS, draft feature specs, split approved specs into work items, triage GitHub Issues, claim ready work, implement and verify changes, open and review pull requests, recover stale runs, and close completed issues with structured run metadata.
defaultPrompt: Initialize Product OS for this repo
Review the current Product OS status
Draft the next Product OS feature spec
Take this GitHub issue through the loop
